content: Crear services/mlb_market_selection.py: select_protected_market(pick_payload) consume pressure_base, statcast, sabermetrics, ghost-edges, fragility, script survival, odds
Cablear market_selection en mlb_day_orchestrator.py (post-fase 9.6, antes de market_lean_classifier)

Fase 13.2 UI: MatchCard collapsible 'MLB Advanced Stats' + 'Sabermetría' + badges por fuente con data-testid

testing_agent backend + frontend para validación final
